title: Settings

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.subtitle: MacMole needs file access to clean your Mac. macOS will ask once per folder.
privacy.fda_desc: Recommended — grants access to all folders at once. No more permission dialogs during cleanup.
privacy.files_desc: Grant access folder-by-folder. macOS will ask once per folder (Downloads, Library, etc.).
privacy.modal_body: MacMole cleans Downloads, Library caches, and app data. macOS will ask for permission the first time it accesses each folder.
privacy.modal_tip: Granting Full Disk Access removes all future permission dialogs.

general.launch_at_login_desc: Start Mole automatically when you log in to macOS

notifications.enable_notifications_desc: Show alert when clean, optimize, or purge finishes
notifications.notifications_blocked: Blocked in System Settings — enable in macOS Notifications
notifications.go_to_system_settings: Go to System Settings → Notifications → Mole to enable.

footer: Mole runs silently in the menu bar. Close the window to hide it; use the menu-bar icon to show it or quit.
